h1.visual_description: Not present on this specific page; typically reserved for chapter or main section titles.

h2.visual_description: Not present on this specific page; likely used for sub-sections.

visual_matchers.pattern: Two-cell horizontal box structure: left cell with light-red background and bold 'Diagram/Figure #' text; right cell with white background and bold descriptive text.
Centered numeric value at the bottom of the page.

markdown_grammar.table_style: markdown (captions are structured as simple 1x2 tables)

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Centered page numbers at the bottom margin (e.g., '21').
